interpretation: Tests whether a specific small prime p (from the Mazur-Kenku set) being a bad prime carries more slope-separation than the mere count of bad primes. If no |slope_diff_p| > 1.0 and the joint 3-way (nbp, has_2, has_3) does not beat pure P021's range (1.316), the rank-2 ladder lives in the COUNT of bad primes, not in any specific small prime's presence.
pattern_20_discipline: Per-(stratum, decade) M_1 computed; n>=100 for inclusion in fit.
Sparse strata reported with sparse=True and excluded from fit.
Slope = OLS of M_1 vs log(conductor_mid) across <=3 decades.
